chunks.text: Cinema is one of the newest of all the arts
born at the start of the twentieth century.
In just over a hundred years, film has become the center of all entertainment.
The power of cinema lies in recreating a story before our eyes.
A dramatic scene shakes the heart of the audience, and a comedy creates laughter.
A great film presents social issues in a way that fascinates and makes the viewer think.
By retelling historical events from a creative angle
it delivers emotional truth that a textbook cannot.
Film critic evaluate a work from many sides.
Award such as the Academy Awards have served to make the quality of films known to the world.
Watching a film is not mere amusement.
In a dark theater, we relive the life of another.
What impress us is not only the beauty of the image.
It is because the choices and conflicts of the characters throw questions at our own way of living.
In the digital age, the way films are made and watched has changed.
But the essence — to move the human heart through story — has not changed one bit since cinema was born with such enthusiasm a century ago.
